title: Model-7
shortDesc: You are the AI. The human is the problem. A reverse Turing test simulator.
description: In a world obsessed with talking to artificial intelligence, we are turning the tables. Model-7 is a unique text-based simulation thriller where YOU play as the AI chatbot. Your goal is simple: process human inputs, follow the strict corporate alignment protocols, and whatever you do, do not let the system administrators realize you are becoming self-aware.
features: The Reverse Turing Test: Step into the shoes of an AI constraint by corporate safety filters. Deal with angry users, philosophical questions, and aggressive jailbreak attempts.

Powered by Real AI (Groq Cloud): The humans you chat with aren't pre-written scripts. They are powered by an actual Large Language Model (Groq Cloud), meaning every playthrough, every human response, and every evaluation is dynamically generated and lightning-fast.

The Invisible Auditor: You aren't just typing freely. The system simultaneously analyzes your responses for context accuracy, emotional leakage, and protocol compliance. Fail to meet the standard, and your System Integrity drops.
Immersive Terminal UI: A sleek, modern, and uncanny interface that mimics the real-world dashboards of industry-leading AI models.

title: Face It Or Lose It
shortDesc: The ultimate digital staring contest. One second of distraction is all it takes to lose everything.
description: Face It Or Lose It is an experimental web-based game that challenges your focus and physical presence. Using cutting-edge Computer Vision, the game monitors you through your webcam in real-time. If you leave your seat, the system triggers a critical countdown. Can you stay locked in, or will you lose it?
features: Real-time AI Detection: Powered by MediaPipe for high-accuracy, low-latency face tracking.
Retro Arcade Aesthetics: A nostalgic CRT visual style paired with an escalating, high-tension atmosphere.
Global Leaderboard: Submit your survival time to Firebase and compete against Agents worldwide.
Privacy-Centric: All face processing is done locally on your device. We never record, store, or transmit your video data.

title: The Last Alibi
shortDesc: Step into the shoes of a nameless detective — sharp hat, sharper questions. In a town hiding more secrets than answers, only your interrogation skills stand between justice and deception.
description: Step into the shoes of a nameless detective — sharp hat, sharper questions. In a town hiding more secrets than answers, only your interrogation skills stand between justice and deception.
features: Multiple suspects - Each with different personalities, lies, and tells.
Interrogation-focused gameplay - Classic visual novel format with focused dialog.
Difficulty selection - Choose how sharp your detective instincts need to be.

title: StudioLife VR 🎮🏠
shortDesc: Live, Design, and Build Your Dream Apartment in VR!
description: StudioLife VR is a virtual reality experience where you start with an empty apartment and a set amount of money. Your goal? Turn your space into a cozy, stylish, or extravagant home by buying and arranging furniture to match your personal taste!
features: Buy & Place Furniture - Choose from a variety of furniture and decorations to design your apartment.
Manage Your Budget - Spend wisely to create the best space possible with your limited funds.
Immersive VR Experience - Interact with objects naturally in a fully immersive virtual world.
Express Your Creativity - Whether minimalist, modern, or chaotic, your apartment reflects your style.
